rules.rule_text:
rule win_mal_GhostWeaver
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects GhostWeaver backdoor"
		author = "RussianPanda"
		date = "2025-2-15"
		hash = "5051f0aa11da67e16797daa51992467ad45c5bf18dcd2e252e8aa63d3fce31bc"

	strings:
		$s1 = "$global:keystr"
		$s2 = "stub"
		$s3 = "ForEach-Object"

	condition:
		all of them and filesize < 1MB and @s3 > 100
}
